100002cc0:	ed 03 16 aa	mov	x13, x22
100002cc4:	ee 03 0c aa	mov	x14, x12
100002cc8:	a0 69 6a fc	ldr	d0, [x13, x10]
100002ccc:	a0 85 00 fc	str	d0, [x13], #0x8
100002cd0:	ce 21 00 f1	subs	x14, x14, #0x8
100002cd4:	a1 ff ff 54	b.ne	0x100002cc8
100002cd8:	7f 01 0c eb	cmp	x11, x12
100002cdc:	80 fb ff 54	b.eq	0x100002c4c
100002ce0:	0d 01 80 52	mov	w13, #0x8
100002ce4:	6c 01 0d cb	sub	x12, x11, x13
100002ce8:	cd 02 0d 8b	add	x13, x22, x13
100002cec:	ae 69 6a 38	ldrb	w14, [x13, x10]
100002cf0:	ae 15 00 38	strb	w14, [x13], #0x1
100002cf4:	8c 05 00 f1	subs	x12, x12, #0x1
100002cf8:	a1 ff ff 54	b.ne	0x100002cec
100002cfc:	d4 ff ff 17	b	0x100002c4c
100002d00:	20 00 20 d4	brk	#0x1
